lifecycleFinding: In force with phased application under the 2024 text. Chapters I and II applied from 2 February 2025 and further listed provisions from 2 August 2025. lifecycleFinding: The Japanese text is authoritative. The 17 July 2026 amendment is promulgated but predominantly uncommenced: limited supplementary provisions began immediately, specified procedural and enforcement provisions begin after six months, and the principal package begins on a Cabinet Order date no later than two years after promulgation. The government English reference translation still identifies Act No. 37 of 2021 as its last version.
versionFinding: Current authoritative Japanese e-Gov consolidation; 2026 amendment promulgated 17 July 2026, with limited immediate and six-month provisions and principal commencement by Cabinet Order within two years
